creator: thepish@FreeBSD.org
text:
>I run /stand/sysinstall

Could you be a little more specific please? What are you doing within
sysinstall? Could you let us know what things you have to perform within
sysinstall to repeat this problem? Are you doing a full system upgrade
or just ducking in to add some extra distributions or prepare a hard disk?
Give me a step by step list of your actions within sysinstall and I'll
try to repeat it.

Peter
